title: Translate catalog field labels/docs (not patient content)
context: This task translates only the catalog's field labels and documentation (UI/docs), never patient-facing or clinical content, broadening accessibility for researchers (backlog). Target languages are not enumerated in the PLAN, so this is one representative task that expands per language on scope confirmation. Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Translate the catalog field labels and developer/user documentation (UI/docs only) into a target language, preserving meaning and the source license.
acceptanceCriteria: Only field labels and docs are translated - no patient-facing or clinical content; technical identifiers and accession terms left untranslated.
Translation reviewed by a fluent speaker for accuracy; source structure/anchors preserved.
Translation released under a source-compatible license (CC BY 4.0 docs); target language(s) confirmed before expansion to additional languages.
output: Translated catalog field labels + docs (UI/docs only) for a confirmed target language.
